title: Block Day 1: Threshold Focus
description: First session of a 2–3 day training block
purpose: First session of a 2–3 day training block

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/3. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/3. 12:00 at threshold. Get comfortable being uncomfortable.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First threshold block. 95-100% FTP. Settle in — don't overcook the start.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Starting threshold work. This is the bread and butter of cycling fitness. Embrace it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First block. Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've clearly never done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First threshold block. 12:00 at 95-100%. Smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 6:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 55% FTP, Seated. 6:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 41% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 28 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 28 minutes in. 100% at 82-90 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 41% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 1 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 41% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 41% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 100%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 6:00. Then 22min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 45-55% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 40 minutes of work done. 22 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Power: 45-55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last threshold block. 100% FTP. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 12:00 at 100%. Then 10min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 10min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final block! 12:00 at 100%. The light at the end of the tunnel. It's probably more threshold work.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. 100% × 12:00. Give it everything. 10min cooldown coming.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 85% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 58 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 10:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
